requirements: Wii U on the latest official firmware
_note: PLACEHOLDER content. Real download URLs + sha256 hashes must be filled from wiiu.hacks.guide / official Aroma releases before shipping. Steps with an empty sha256 skip verification — do NOT ship them empty.

steps.title: Before you start
steps.body:
This walks you through installing **Aroma**, the current custom firmware for the Wii U.

Make sure your SD card is formatted **FAT32** and your Wii U is on the latest firmware.

steps.title: Download Aroma
steps.body: Downloading the Aroma package and verifying it hasn't been corrupted.

steps.title: Copy Aroma to your SD card
steps.body: Extracting Aroma to the root of your SD card. This creates the `wiiu` folder and payloads.

steps.title: Put the SD card back in your Wii U
steps.body: Safely eject the SD card and insert it into your **Wii U**.

steps.title: Launch the exploit
steps.body:
On the Wii U, open the **Internet Browser** and go to the exploit page (see wiiu.hacks.guide). Aroma will load.

Tap **I did this** once it boots.

steps.title: You're done
steps.body: Aroma is installed. From now on it loads automatically. You can add homebrew apps to the `wiiu/apps` folder on your SD card.
